mapper.select: select f.file_id, f.storage_type, f.bucket_name, f.region, f.object_key, f.original_name, f.file_name, f.file_ext, f.content_type, f.file_size, f.file_url, f.etag, f.source_module, f.create_by, f.create_time from scm_product_certificate_file rel inner join scm_file f on f.file_id = rel.file_id and f.del_flag = '0' where rel.certificate_id = #{certificateId} and rel.del_flag = '0' order by rel.sort_order asc, rel.create_time asc
mapper.update: update scm_product_certificate_file set del_flag = '2' where certificate_id = #{certificateId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into scm_product_certificate_file (id, certificate_id, file_id, sort_order, del_flag, create_by, create_time) values (#{id}, #{certificateId}, #{fileId}, #{sortOrder}, '0', #{createBy}, now())
